creator: wxs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Can you please test this patch to make sure it properly picks up libdbi
now.  My testing shows it does, but I'd prefer some run-time testing if
possible.

Jon, do you approve of this patch?  While I'm at it, the port does
support rrdtool (suggested).  Do you want to enable this dependency, or
save it for later?

-- WXS
